[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up portrait shows a person wearing a dark beanie and smiling with an overlaid yellow face emoji at the center of the image.

Main Subject:
A person is shown from the upper shoulders up, facing the camera with eyes partly closed and a slight smile. A yellow circular emoji face with a black curved mouth and simple features covers the lower center of the image, partially obscuring the person’s face.

Setting:
The background appears to be indoors with blurred surfaces and colorful panels or posters, including a blue area on the left and an orange/red area on the right. The camera angle is close and slightly off to the side, with shallow depth of field causing the background to blur.

Visual Details:
The person has dark hair visible under a black beanie and a light-to-medium skin tone. The clothing appears dark. Lighting is soft and even, with a slightly warm tone. The composition is tightly framed around the person’s head and upper torso, while the emoji overlay is centered over the lower face.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image is a blurred close-up of a person wearing a dark beanie, with part of their lower face covered by a yellow emoji overlay. The background looks like an indoor space with colorful, out-of-focus elements.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
